task_objective: Enhance file browser UI with directory-first sorting, folder icons, and native selectbox placeholder.
tests_added: Updated tests/test_file_browser_filtering.py for sorting and placeholder removal.
design_decisions: Used st.selectbox(index=None, placeholder=...) to provide a clean prompt without adding a placeholder item to the options list.
Updated selection logic to handle None when no item is selected (initial state).
Maintained directory-first sorting and folder icons (📁, ⤴️) for better visual navigation.
results: File browser UI is now clean, sorted, and uses native Streamlit placeholder functionality. All tests pass.
